Reference both in manifest.json with the correct size and type fields. These must be self-contained with no external resources.

message:
Both files are correct. Here's a summary of what was done:

**Created two SVG icon files:**

- `icon-192.svg` — 192×192 viewBox, rounded-rect background in `#4a90e2` (brand blue), three white horizontal bars (checklist motif) with a white checkmark overlaid on the bottom two lines
- `icon-512.svg` — 512×512 viewBox, same design scaled proportionally with `rx="64"` rounded corners (follows Apple/Android icon guidelines for larger sizes)

**Design details:**
- Both are fully self-contained SVGs with no external resources (no `<image>`, no `xlink:href`, no `use` referencing external files)
- Use only the `#4a90e2` brand color as background and `#ffffff` for the checklist/checkmark elements
- The `sizes` and `type` fields in the existing `manifest.json` (`192x192`/`512x512`, `image/svg+xml`) match the files exactly

message: Started subtask 3/4: Create sw.js that on install caches the app shell: index.html, manifest.json, icon-192.svg, icon-512.svg. On fetch, serve from cache first and fall back to network. Use a versioned cache name (e.g. 'todo-v1') and clean up old caches on activate. Must not request any external URLs — all cached URLs are same-origin only.

data.subtaskDescription: Create sw.js that on install caches the app shell: index.html, manifest.json, icon-192.svg, icon-512.svg. On fetch, serve from cache first and fall back to network. Use a versioned cache name (e.g. 'todo-v1') and clean up old caches on activate. Must not request any external URLs — all cached URLs are same-origin only.

message:
**Created `sw.js`** with:

- **`install`**: Opens `todo-v1` cache and pre-caches `index.html`, `manifest.json`, `icon-192.svg`, `icon-512.svg`. Calls `skipWaiting()` for immediate activation.
- **`activate`**: Deletes any caches whose name is not `todo-v1` (old version cleanup). Calls `clients.claim()` so the SW controls all open tabs immediately.
- **`fetch`**: Cache-first strategy — serves from cache when available, falls back to network and caches the response. Requests not originating from the same origin are ignored entirely, preserving the privacy guarantee (no external URL requests).

Completed subtask 3/4: Create sw.js that on install caches the app shell: index.html, manifest.json, icon-192.svg, icon-512.svg. On fetch, serve from cache first and fall back to network. Use a versioned cache name (e.g. 'todo-v1') and clean up old caches on activate. Must not request any external URLs — all cached URLs are same-origin only.

message: Started subtask 4/4: In the <head> of index.html: add <link rel='manifest' href='manifest.json'>, <meta name='theme-color' content='#4a90e2'>, <meta name='apple-mobile-web-app-capable' content='yes'>, <meta name='apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style'>, and <link rel='apple-touch-icon' href='icon-192.svg'>. At the end of <body>, add an inline <script> block that registers sw.js via navigator.serviceWorker.register('./sw.js') guarded by feature detection.

At the end of <body>, add an inline <script> block that registers sw.js via navigator.serviceWorker.register('./sw.js') guarded by feature detection.

message:
All changes are in place. Here's what was added to `index.html`:

**In `<head>` (lines 22–26):**
- `<link rel="manifest" href="manifest.json">` — links the Web App Manifest
- `<meta name="theme-color" content="#4a90e2">` — sets the browser toolbar/status bar color to the app's brand blue
- `<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">` — enables standalone mode on iOS
- `<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="default">` — sets the iOS status bar style
- `<link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="icon-192.svg">` — provides the home screen icon for iOS Safari

**At the end of `<body>` (lines 523–527):**
- An inline `<script>` block that registers `./sw.js` guarded by `'serviceWorker' in navigator` feature detection, so it degrades gracefully on browsers that don't support Service Workers.

Completed subtask 4/4: In the <head> of index.html: add <link rel='manifest' href='manifest.json'>, <meta name='theme-color' content='#4a90e2'>, <meta name='apple-mobile-web-app-capable' content='yes'>, <meta name='apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style'>, and <link rel='apple-touch-icon' href='icon-192.svg'>. At the end of <body>, add an inline <script> block that registers sw.js via navigator.serviceWorker.register('./sw.js') guarded by feature detection.

data.subtaskDescription: In the <head> of index.html: add <link rel='manifest' href='manifest.json'>, <meta name='theme-color' content='#4a90e2'>, <meta name='apple-mobile-web-app-capable' content='yes'>, <meta name='apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style'>, and <link rel='apple-touch-icon' href='icon-192.svg'>. At the end of <body>, add an inline <script> block that registers sw.js via navigator.serviceWorker.register('./sw.js') guarded by feature detection.
